mapper.select: SELECT m.meeting_id, m.host_user_id, u.nickname host_nickname, m.title, m.content, m.place_name, m.address, m.meeting_date, m.start_time, m.max_members, m.status, s.name sport_name, CONCAT(r.sido," ",r.sigungu," ",COALESCE(r.dong,"")) region_name, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingParticipants mp WHERE mp.meeting_id=m.meeting_id AND mp.status="APPROVED" ) approved_count FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.host_user_id=u.user_id JOIN sports s ON m.sport_id=s.sport_id JOIN regions r ON m.region_id=r.region_id WHERE m.meeting_id=#{meetingId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meetings( host_user_id, sport_id, region_id, title, content, place_name, address, meeting_date, start_time, max_members, meeting_type, repeat_type, status ) VALUES( #{hostUserId}, #{sportId}, #{regionId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{placeName}, #{address}, #{meetingDate}, #{startTime}, #{maxMembers}, #{meetingType}, #{repeatType}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE meetings SET title=#{request.title}, content=#{request.content}, place_name=#{request.placeName}, address=#{request.address}, meeting_date=#{request.meetingDate}, start_time=#{request.startTime}, max_members=#{request.maxMembers}, status=#{request.status} WHERE meeting_id=#{meetingId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
